name: @ever-works/posthog-metrics-plugin
description: PostHog Metrics Plugin - Read-only PostHog product analytics metrics (event counts, active users) for Ever Works Goals

plugin.name: PostHog Metrics
plugin.description: Read-only PostHog product analytics metrics — event counts and unique active users per day/week/month — for evaluating Goals like "100 signups/day" or "1000 active users/month".

envVars.name: POSTHOG_PERSONAL_API_KEY
envVars.description: PostHog personal API key (a key scoped to Query: Read only is strongly recommended; can also be set via admin/user settings)

envVars.name: POSTHOG_PROJECT_ID
envVars.description: PostHog project id metrics are read from (can also be set via admin/user settings)
